name: The Clubhaus
about: The Clubhaus is an indoor golf venue featuring 4 Uneekor simulators with professional-grade launch monitors. The facility offers a variety of games and programs suitable for all skill levels, from advanced golfers to beginners. Reservations are made by the hour, with rates based on group size. The venue maintains a comfortable sports bar atmosphere with full food and beverage services, making it a social space for both practice and recreation.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Uneekor simulators with multiple game options
Relaxed sports bar atmosphere with full bar and food service
Variety of programs for all skill levels from mini golf to full course play
Convenient hourly booking based on group size
Availability for leagues, tournaments, and private events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service available with pizzas

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The Clubhaus provides all necessary equipment, including clubs, for use during your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, as the venue offers full kitchen and bar services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A single golfer can typically complete a full 18-hole course in one hour, though larger groups may need more time.

faq.question: Is The Clubhaus kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Clubhaus offers games suitable for beginners and families, including mini golf and target practice options.
